meta.title: Brand Projects - streetwave®
meta.description: Limited-edition collections, collaborations, and branded customs for campaigns and gifting.

hero.title: Limited-edition projects for brands
hero.subtitle: Custom collections, collaborations, and branded work. From concept to logistics.

manifesto.title: From mass market to contemporary art masterpiece
manifesto.text: The Street Wave team creates collections that transcend the product and become objects of contemporary art. We shape a statement through art and amplify the meaning of a project, turning it into a cultural event. Every project is a dialogue between street culture and business strategy. Between emotion and objective. Between a brand's identity and its audience. We translate the brand into the language of art. From mass product to cultural artifact.

steps.title: Brief
steps.desc: We discuss the objective, audience, format, and budget.

steps.title: Concept & Quote
steps.desc: We prepare a visual concept and detailed estimate for approval.

steps.title: Contract
steps.desc: We agree on terms and sign the contract.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: We launch production with quality control at every stage.

steps.title: Logistics & Report
steps.desc: Delivery, setup (for events), and a final report.

cta.title: Have a project idea?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about the task - we'll propose a format and estimate the budget.
